name: Meetinghouse Golf
about: Meetinghouse Golf is an indoor golf simulator venue that provides year-round golfing in perfect weather. The facility features a loyalty program offering 5% cash back and accepts various credit cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Cash App. It offers online booking through a third-party system and provides services like leagues, events, lessons, and memberships. The venue emphasizes community with local support and social golfing opportunities.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round golfing in perfect weather conditions
Loyalty program with 5% cash back on all spending
Variety of services including leagues, events, and data-powered lessons
Convenient online booking system for easy reservations

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB not mentioned, payment options indicate no on-site alcohol sales

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: It's recommended to bring your own clubs, but the venue likely has rentals available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food is available on-site, but alcohol is not mentioned as being served, so BYOB may be allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes typically take 1-2 hours depending on group size and simulator usage.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue appears to be family-friendly with events and a welcoming atmosphere.
